economic_mechanism: A completed bull steepening in the official U.S. Treasury 2s10s daily par-yield curve may reduce short funding pressure relative to longer asset yields; if regional-bank equities underreact to that lending-margin tailwind, KRE should rise and outperform XLF over the next ten completed sessions.
candidate_or_family_scope: Exact OFFICIAL_2S10S_BULL_STEEPENING_KRE_BULL_CALL_21D_V1 / OFFICIAL_YIELD_CURVE_BULL_STEEPENING_REGIONAL_BANK_RELATIVE_UPDRIFT on official Treasury 2 Yr and 10 Yr par yields joined without forward fill to adjusted KRE/XLF/SPY closes: 20-observation spread change >=+0.20 percentage points, 2-year change <=-0.10 percentage points, KRE and SPY above fully warmed SMA100, rising edge, non-overlapping next-close entry and tenth-subsequent-close exit, 10-bps round-trip underlying sensitivity, chronological 60/40 train/sealed identity holdout, and zero option pricing. Future-only one-lot KRE 18-28 DTE $2-wide bull-call planning expression: capital_fit_usd=200, frictionless planning max_loss_usd=200 before debit/closing friction/assignment/exercise/management validation, max_lots=1.
falsifier: Close the exact family unless train contains at least 24 non-overlapping episodes across at least 10 signal years, positive KRE mean after the labeled 10-bps round-trip sensitivity, positive KRE-minus-XLF mean, a non-vacuous positive five-episode-block LB90, KRE hit rate at least 55%, relative hit rate at least 52%, KRE event-return worst-decile mean at least -7%, and zero chronology/population/integrity violations; do not inspect holdout outcomes or price options.

strategy_advancement.summary: The exact candidate and family remain F0 and are closed. Seven total frozen events yielded only four train episodes across two years; the machine-readable year distribution is 2009:1 and 2024:3, so 75% of train episodes cluster in 2024. Favorable KRE after-cost and KRE-minus-XLF centers cannot rescue n<24, years<10, or a non-vacuous five-episode uncertainty gate. Three holdout identities remain outcome-unread and option pricing is zero.

search_information.summary: The wake replaced a confounded Treasury-ETF proxy pre-outcome with direct official par-yield tenors, added and exercised a persisted/replayable exact-date lab, exposed the decisive sparse and calendar-concentrated population, and hardened duplicate-date and round-trip-cost evidence labels without changing the family close.

useful_deltas.summary: Added a reusable official Treasury par-yield adapter and train-only regional-bank lab with persisted-byte hashing, no forward fill, exact-date market joins, completed-bar lag, non-overlap, sealed holdout identities, deterministic bootstrap sensitivity, strict JSON, and focused behavior/boundary/positive/negative tests.

Finalizer made source and evidence semantics fail closed and machine-readable: duplicate Treasury dates are rejected before missing-tenor drops, the modeled cost is labeled as one 10-bps round-trip underlying sensitivity rather than per-leg cost, and train year counts plus 75% maximum calendar concentration are serialized and tested.

Closed both stable IDs for the exact official-2s10s regional-bank geometry. Only seven events existed in about twenty years; train n=4 across two years and three of four episodes in 2024 failed density, calendar breadth, and non-vacuous uncertainty despite favorable centers. Holdout outcomes remain unread and no option path was measured.

Counted this accepted close as successor-epoch no-advance decision two, set strategy_pivot_required=true while burst-stop remains false, and quarantined threshold, horizon, sign, trend, control, unclustered, holdout, and option-wrapper salvage. A third no-advance must stop the burst for reassessment.

critic_findings.finding: N1: acceptance makes successor-epoch counted no-advance decisions two, pivot required true, and burst-stop false.
critic_findings.rationale: Rejected as a claim or code defect because challenger correctly described normal finalizer state transition rather than a flaw in the executor evidence. Finalizer updated configs/search_epoch.json, the active epoch doc, readiness, wake surfaces, and this handoff to count two and require a material pivot.

critic_findings.finding: N2: durable evidence must expose that three of four train episodes occur in 2024 rather than state only two signal years.
critic_findings.rationale: The runner now serializes train_signal_year_counts={2009:1, 2024:3} and train_calendar_concentration_max_fraction=0.75. A focused positive-panel test locks year counts and concentration, and living reports treat the concentration as part of the density failure rather than a salvage path.

critic_findings.finding: N3: finalizer must independently rerun focused and full verification.
critic_findings.rationale: Rejected as a code defect because this is finalizer process ownership. learning-promotion.md records finalizer-owned focused, adjacent, full-suite, compile, replay, strict-JSON, hash, handoff, and completion-prepare results; executor counts are not inherited as final proof.

critic_findings.finding: N4: dividend NEXT must freeze a new multi-issuer increase mechanism and must not relabel assignment-guard or provenance tooling as strategy evidence.
critic_findings.rationale: Rejected as a missing-NEXT defect because merged-next-seed.md already contains this exact anti-thrash boundary. Finalizer preserves it as the sole NEXT in epoch, readiness, wake, learning, and compounding surfaces.

critic_findings.finding: N5: a third successor no-advance must trigger burst stop; do not answer repeated sparse-event failure with another nearby event-to-bull-call clone.
critic_findings.rationale: Rejected as a current defect because it is non-blocking forward context already encoded by the epoch contract. Finalizer records pivot=true and burst_stop=false now, with an explicit third-no-advance reassessment boundary.

critic_findings.finding: N6: regenerate readiness, INDEX, LATEST, and merge surfaces from the accepted 1123 close rather than leave the integrated 0546 strategy body or preflight NEXT living.
critic_findings.rationale: Rejected as a challenger-phase evidence defect because predecessor readiness remained intentionally authoritative until finalization. Finalizer rewrites every living surface to the accepted 1123 family close, zero living candidates/leaders/seats, successor count two, pivot=true, burst_stop=false, and deterministic integration pending.

critic_findings.finding: Finalizer independent audit: duplicate source dates could be hidden when one duplicate had missing tenors, and the artifact's cost key said per-leg while the model subtracts one 10-bps round-trip sensitivity.
critic_findings.rationale: Raw date uniqueness is now checked before missing-tenor rows are dropped. Frozen geometry now uses underlying_round_trip_cost_bps=10.0, and evaluate_train derives its deduction from the same constant. Focused negative and semantic boundary tests lock both repairs; the unchanged strategy metrics and FAMILY_CLOSED decision were regenerated from persisted inputs.

data_dependencies: No new data are required to preserve this exact family close. Reopening requires a genuinely new evidence class and pre-outcome charter, not threshold, horizon, sign, trend, control, clustering, holdout, or option-wrapper salvage.

Any future KRE option expression requires actual listed expiry/strike geometry, debit and closing friction, theta/vega path, management, assignment/exercise, and claim-appropriate calibration; this F0 run priced zero options.

The dividend-increase successor may reuse declaration-date provenance plumbing, but it requires a newly frozen multi-issuer regular-increase event population and controls before any forward-return read.

no_advance_context.reason: This accepted family close is the second counted no-advance decision in the successor epoch, so the next strategy wake must pivot mechanism or evidence class.

next: MULTI_ISSUER_DIVIDEND_INCREASE_FORWARD_UPDRIFT_F0: pivot to a materially different issuer cash-flow-confidence mechanism. Before outcomes, freeze a point-in-time regular cash-dividend increase definition from declaration-date and amount records; exclude specials, unchanged amounts, cuts, preferred/ambiguous securities, missing known_at, nonpositive amounts, and chronology conflicts; predeclare a fixed liquid multi-issuer panel with same-date sector controls, next-close ten-session forecast, labeled underlying cost, global chronological train/sealed identity holdout, and density/year/issuer-breadth, specificity, dependence-aware uncertainty, hit-rate, tail, and integrity gates. Existing dividend provenance and assignment-guard tooling is infrastructure, not edge evidence. Close exactly one STRATEGY_ADVANCED F0->F1 or FAMILY_CLOSED decision in-wake. Future one-lot defined-risk expression must have capital_fit_usd and max_loss_usd <=300 with max_lots=1. No yield-curve salvage, holdout reads, L1, seat, paper, shadow, arm, broker, funding, or live authority.
